overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a futuristic ancient city with white marble architecture, lush gardens, and water features. The character explores a sunlit promenade passing NPCs and approaching a docked ship.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide marble promenade with geometric planters

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the promenade toward the city center

notable_agents.action: two NPCs sitting on stone benches engaged in conversation

entered.detail: tall structure with smooth white stone facade and large windows
slender dark green cypress trees lining the path ahead
raised planters with vibrant purple flowers
tall crystalline towers rising in the background
white marble benches with seated NPCs

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide sunlit promenade with a white marble building on the right and landscaped gardens on the left. Two NPCs sit on stone benches to the left, while tall cypress trees and futuristic spires rise in the distance.

events.description: path opens to reveal turquoise water canal on the right side

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past seated NPCs and approaching the waterfront

notable_agents.action: NPC in yellow robe walking along the water's edge

entered.detail: turquoise water canal reflecting the bright sky
low white stone railing along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character passes the seated NPCs as the path opens to reveal a turquoise water canal on the right. An NPC in yellow robes walks along the waterfront ahead, while the white marble building recedes into the distance.

events.description: entering narrower walled corridor with steep descent toward water
ancient sailing ship comes into view at the dock ahead

agents.ego_description: walking down the sloping path toward the docked ship

entered.detail: tall white stone walls enclosing the path on the right
large wooden trireme with furled sails docked at the pier
rocky cliff face with cascading water features

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrower descending corridor with high stone walls on the right. The water canal falls behind as the path slopes down toward a dock where an ancient sailing ship is moored, with waterfall features visible on the cliff faces ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a sunlit promenade that gradually descends from an open garden plaza toward a secluded waterfront dock. It begins with the character walking past a white marble building and landscaped gardens, where NPCs sit on stone benches beneath distant futuristic spires. As the character passes the benches, the path opens to reveal a turquoise water canal on the right and an NPC in yellow robes walking ahead. The scene then shifts as the promenade narrows into a descending corridor with high stone walls, leaving the canal behind. Finally, the path slopes downward toward a moored ancient sailing ship, with waterfall features cascading down the surrounding cliff faces.
